changes: allowed_categories: ['EWS', 'SC', 'ST', 'Minority', 'Women', 'Farmer', 'BPL', 'Disabled', 'Senior Citizen', 'Student'] → ['Below Poverty Line (BPL)', 'Economically Weaker Section (EWS)', 'Farmer', 'Minority', 'Persons with Disability (PwD)', 'Scheduled Caste (SC)', 'Scheduled Tribe (ST)', 'Senior Citizen (60+)', 'Student', 'Women']

normalized_data.description: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban 2.0 (PMAY-U 2.0) aims to provide Central Assistance to eligible families/beneficiaries through States/UTs/PLIs to construct, purchase or rent affordable houses in urban areas.
normalized_data.benefit: Financial Assistance to construct, purchase or rent a house at an affordable cost in cities.
normalized_data.application_process: Eligible families/beneficiaries can apply for PMAY-U 2.0 through States/UTs/PLIs. The application process involves submitting required documents and meeting the eligibility criteria.
